signals.reconciliation_hint: SPLIT: brain confidence only 55% (HOLD); legacy says CAUTION. The brains aren't sure here — lean on the data. Your call.

brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 33, mirroring the deep capitulation seen in August 2024. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin growth is quietly accelerating, suggesting sidelined capital is building up dry powder rather than fleeing the ecosystem entirely. With the MVRV Z-Score compressing to levels that historically preceded sharp reversals, the current anxiety looks less like the start of a bear phase and more like the final shakeout before sidelined capital is forced to reprice risk.
brain_consensus.headline: The Quiet Accumulation Beneath the Panic

next_move.reasoning: Despite the 78% match to bottom_2024_aug Disbelief, the current score sits at 33 (Fear & Greed 33, composite factors averaging ~51 but sentiment-anchored at Anxiety band 39-46 with ±1 allowing Denial/Anxiety/Panic), and massive divergences in ETF flows (+45), BTC dominance fade (+25), and VIX (+27) show this is NOT a true bottom analog—it's a mid-cycle chop with elevated institutional inflows and risk-hedging, not the distrust of August 2024; with 0/16 direction accuracy and recent regime-shift misses, the safest read is we hold Anxiety rather than predict a false breakout or breakdown.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 AND funding collapses below 35 with stablecoin growth accelerating above 55
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows sustain above 90 AND btc_momentum_30d breaks above 65 with funding rising above 60, pushing into Hope/Optimism

narrative.headline: The Quiet Accumulation Beneath the Panic

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc points toward a liquidity-driven squeeze higher once fear exhausts itself, as sidelined stablecoin reserves are deployed in a relief rally reminiscent of the August 2024 bottom.
